overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking along Vespucci Beach promenade during a colorful sunset. The camera follows a pedestrian in a light blue jacket from a street corner, along the palm-lined boardwalk past various beachgoers, and finally turns up a steep ramp away from the beach. The scene features warm golden-hour lighting with pink and orange skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: beachfront promenade entrance from city street

events.description: turns left from street corner onto the open beachfront promenade
begins following a pedestrian in a light blue jacket walking ahead

agents.ego_description: walking from the urban street corner onto the beachfront promenade, following a pedestrian in a light blue jacket

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in light blue jacket and dark pants walking ahead on the promenade

entered.detail: multi-story building with distinctive yellow awnings and wooden balconies facing the beach
white sports car parked along the street curb
tall palm trees lining the edge of the promenade along the sand
covered shelter structure with benches on the sandy beach area

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a city street corner with parked cars and historic buildings, then transitions onto the Vespucci Beach promenade. The camera follows a pedestrian in a light blue jacket as they walk along the paved walkway, with palm trees lining the left side and a large beachfront hotel with yellow awnings on the right. The sunset casts long shadows across the concrete surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: open beachfront boardwalk with pedestrian traffic

events.description: crowd density increases with more pedestrians in summer clothing and swimwear
jogger passes by on the left while maintaining forward trajectory

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the promenade boardwalk, navigating through moderate pedestrian traffic while following the target pedestrian

notable_agents.action: man in white t-shirt and khaki shorts jogging past the camera in the opposite direction
woman in bikini walking along the promenade away from the camera

entered.detail: vintage-style black lamp posts with spherical lights along the walkway
tall building with geometric facade and large windows further down the beach

segments.scene_description: Walking along the wide open promenade with the beach visible to the left and buildings to the right. The palm trees now line the immediate left side of the path. Various pedestrians in summer attire and swimwear walk in both directions. The beachfront hotel with yellow awnings recedes into the distance as the camera moves forward, while an art deco style building becomes visible further ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep access ramp leading up from beachfront

events.description: turns right off the promenade onto a steep uphill ramp leading away from the beach
begins ascending the inclined ramp, changing elevation significantly

agents.ego_description: turning right and walking up the steep asphalt ramp away from the beach, leaving the main promenade area

entered.detail: inclined asphalt road with white railings leading up from the beachfront to upper streets
wooden power poles with multiple crossbars and wires running along the right side of the ramp
decorative white and red patterned fence along the ramp edge

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right and leaves the main promenade, entering a steep uphill ramp that ascends away from the beach. The art deco building now dominates the left side of the frame at close range, while utility poles line the right side. The beach and palm trees recede into the distance below as the camera climbs the inclined asphalt surface, with the sunset sky still visible overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a city street corner onto a bustling beach promenade that eventually ascends away from the coast. It begins among parked cars and historic buildings before transitioning onto the paved Vespucci Beach walkway, following a pedestrian in a light blue jacket past palm trees and a beachfront hotel with yellow awnings. As the camera moves forward, the hotel recedes and the scene opens up to a wide promenade filled with beachgoers in summer attire, with an art deco building appearing in the distance. The camera then turns right to leave the main path, entering a steep uphill ramp where the art deco building looms close on the left and utility poles line the right. Finally, the beach and palm trees recede below as the camera climbs the inclined asphalt surface under a vibrant sunset sky.
